--- graph_table_match_columns_dot_star.sql
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) COLUMNS (n.*, 1 AS number))

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.Star{
        Star: 7,
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   9,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 14,
        RParen:     79,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 27,
              NameEnd: 35,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GraphTableMatch{
          Match: &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    36,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  42,
                          Rparen:  51,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 43,
                              NameEnd: 44,
                              Name:    "n",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 44,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 45,
                                  NameEnd: 51,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          Columns: &ast.GraphTableColumns{
            Columns: 53,
            RParen:  78,
            Items:   []ast.SelectItem{
              &ast.DotStar{
                Star: 64,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 62,
                  NameEnd: 63,
                  Name:    "n",
                },
              },
              &ast.Alias{
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 67,
                  ValueEnd: 68,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
                As: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    69,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 72,
                    NameEnd: 78,
                    Name:    "number",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) COLUMNS(n.*, 1 AS number))
